# Skyline Suites

> Skyline Suites is a luxury hotel offering premium rooms and suites, a rooftop pool, fine dining, and full-service amenities, with online booking available.

Skyline Suites is an independently run hotel established in 2014, offering Classic Rooms, Deluxe Rooms, Skyline Suites, and Penthouse Suites, along with a rooftop pool and on-site restaurant.

## Pages

- [Home](https://yourdomain.com/index.html): Overview of the hotel, amenities, and booking call-to-action.
- [About](https://yourdomain.com/about.html): Hotel history, stats, and staff information.
- [Rooms](https://yourdomain.com/rooms.html): Room types, sizes, and nightly rates.
- [Gallery](https://yourdomain.com/gallery.html): Photos of rooms, pool, restaurant, and architecture.
- [Booking](https://yourdomain.com/booking.html): Online reservation form with room selection.
- [Contact](https://yourdomain.com/contact.html): Address, phone, email, and contact form.

## Contact
